name: python3-gi
title: python3-gi
description:
Python 3 bindings for gobject-introspection libraries
GObject is an abstraction layer that allows programming with an object
paradigm that is compatible with many languages. It is a part of Glib,
the core library used to build GTK+ and GNOME.
.
This package contains the Python 3 binding generator for libraries that
support gobject-introspection, i. e. which ship a gir1.2-<name>-<version>
package. With these packages, the libraries can be used from Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-gi because Python 3 bindings for gobject-introspection libraries.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-gi as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-gi with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-gi --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
